description: SDXL 1.0 + Graffiti LoRA (DreamBooth) — graffiti lettering / mural style
_comment: DreamBooth LoRA trained on 'graarg graffiti' images using SDXL base 1.0.
_comment_trigger: TRIGGER WORD: include 'graarg graffiti' in your prompt (the token the LoRA was trained on).
_comment_vae: Trained with madebyollin/sdxl-vae-fp16-fix; standard VAE may produce slightly different colours.
_comment_steps: SDXL default is 30–50 steps. 30 is sufficient for LoRA styles.
_comment_cfg: CFG 5–9 works well for SDXL. 7.5 is a safe default.
_comment_offload: Enable on ≤16 GB unified memory (MPS) to avoid OOM — roughly halves peak VRAM at cost of speed.
